summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. All three new features (Staff Permission System, WhatsApp Notifications via Twilio, Meta OAuth Integration) are fully functional. Backend APIs return correct responses and Frontend UI displays appropriate status banners.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp integration properly returns 'configured: false' when TWILIO credentials not set
Meta OAuth integration properly returns 'configured: false' when META_APP_ID/SECRET not set
Staff permissions endpoint correctly returns all permissions as true for admin role
OAuth status banner correctly shows 'OAuth Yapılandırılmadı' with instructions to add credentials
Manuel Token button is visible and accessible for manual token entry
All sidebar menu items (Revizyonlar, Bildirimler, Meta Entegrasyonu, Personel, Makbuzlar) are present and navigable
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features are working: 1) Staff Permission System - /api/user/permissions returns correct permissions for admin (all true), 2) WhatsApp Notifications - /api/whatsapp/status returns configured:false (expected - no Twilio credentials), 3) Meta OAuth - /api/meta/oauth/status returns configured:false (expected - no META_APP_ID/SECRET). UI shows appropriate status banners when integrations are not configured.

backend: GET /api/user/permissions - Returns admin permissions with all flags true ✓
frontend: Login page loads with Turkish translations ✓
Sidebar shows all menu items including Revizyonlar and Bildirimler ✓
Meta Integration page shows OAuth status banner (Not Configured) ✓
Meta Integration page has Manuel Token button ✓
Admin Receipts page loads with stats and tabs ✓
Notifications page loads with notification list ✓

whatsapp_twilio.reason: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN not set in backend/.env
whatsapp_twilio.ui_behavior: WhatsApp checkbox in AdminReceipts only shows when configured

meta_oauth.reason: META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET not set in backend/.env
meta_oauth.ui_behavior: Shows amber banner with instructions to add credentials, OAuth button hidden, Manuel Token button visible
